name: cc-edge-codex-io
author: VisiCore Tech - CriblPacks@VisiCoreTech.com
description: Cribl Edge Pack that collects OpenAI Codex CLI session transcripts (rollout JSONL: turn context, response items, tool calls, reasoning) and prompt history from the local filesystem, then forwards them to a Cribl Stream worker group for indexing, analysis, and search.
